title: andropogon gabonensis
intro: Andropogon gabonensis, also known as African Lemon Grass or Citronella Grass, is a tropical grass native to West and Central Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Andropogon gabonensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
